# Alex McConnell

> Full stack software engineer based in Hartford, CT.

Alex McConnell is a full stack engineer building the borrower verification platform behind AI-driven credit decisioning at Upstart. He works across the stack on the systems that verify borrower identity, income, and employment — the data layer that makes responsible lending possible.

Outside of engineering he is a dad and rock climber.

## Work

- **Company:** Upstart (https://www.upstart.com)
- **Role:** Full Stack Engineer
- **Focus:** Borrower verification platform — the infrastructure behind AI-driven credit decisioning

## Contact

- Email: alexmcc.dev@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/alexmccdev
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/alexmccdev
- Website: https://alexmcc.dev
